title: Two-Phase Locking (2PL) Protocol Flow
description: A flowchart depicting the sequence of phases and rules a transaction must follow in the Two-Phase Locking protocol to ensure serializability.
relationships: A transaction must acquire all locks in the Growing Phase before it can release any locks in the Shrinking Phase
Lock Point marks the transition from the Growing Phase to the Shrinking Phase
Read/Write Locks are acquired on data items during the Growing Phase and released during the Shrinking Phase
